title: Pipe Bomb
description: Adds a pipe bomb to mail to your friends. :)
body:
# Adds a pipe bomb to the game.


When the pipe bomb is held, it drops on the ground and blows up.
Terrain destruction can be configured via gamerule.

Use with mail mod of your choice. :)


```
⚠️ DO NOT TRY THIS AT HOME. DO NOT MAIL YOUR FRIENDS A PIPE BOMB IN REAL LIFE. THIS MOD IS A JOKE AND SHOULD NOT BE TAKEN SERIOUSLY ⚠️
```

![Pipe Bomb crafting recipe - 3 iron on top and bottom, redstone dust on the sides, and 1 tnt in the middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68dc961880c478c3a5e0865a8f087db95850f634.png)

> # FAQ:
> 
> Q: Can you port to X version/modloader?
> A: No, I have pretty much zero modding knowledge and made this mod due to there not being a pipe bomb mod for Forge 1.20.1. There are plenty of other mods for other versions you can _probably_ use.
> 
> Q: I found a bug, where should I report it?
> A: DM me on Discord if you find any issues @vort3xx_

<sub>Made with [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/about)
